coverage.note: All 3 changed production files (if.cs, compare.cs, DefaultEvaluator.cs) have dedicated tests exercising the v2 changes.

findings.issue: IfTrue_GoalNotFound_ReturnsError (line 175) still only asserts result.Success == false. No Error.Key check. Carried over from v1 finding #4.
findings.impact: Code could return the wrong error type and the test would still pass.

findings.issue: ValidationError.FixSuggestion property (if.cs lines 59-61, compare.cs lines 31) is set but never verified by any test. If deleted, no test fails.
findings.impact: Low — FixSuggestion is a UX diagnostic aid, not a correctness concern. But the deletion test proves it's untested.
findings.suggestion: Add assertion: await Assert.That(result.Error!.FixSuggestion).Contains("operator"); to one of the error-path tests.

findings.issue: No PLang .goal pipeline tests exist for the new condition actions. Carried over from v1 finding #5. Deferred pending builder prompt update.
findings.impact: Full pipeline (builder -> .pr -> GoalMapper -> runtime) is untested for the new action format.
findings.suggestion: PLang pipeline tests should be added when the builder prompt is updated to generate Left/Operator/Right.

summary: All 1595 C# tests pass (1588 from v1 + 7 new in v2). Zero regressions. Coder v2 addressed all 4 auditor findings: (1) If.Run() try/catch with strong error-path tests checking Error.Key and message content, (2) Compare.Run() same pattern, (3) WiderNumericType decimal fallback, (4) Compare __condition__ negative test. Security finding #4 (non-IComparable throws) also fixed with dedicated tests. The v1 weak assertion in ConditionHandlerTests.IfTrue_GoalNotFound_ReturnsError remains unfixed (minor). FixSuggestion property is untested (minor). PLang pipeline tests still deferred. All new tests are honest — deletion of the try/catch blocks would cause unhandled exceptions and test failures.
